title: Railway Land Encroachment Assessment — NDLS Zone
generatedBy: GeoVision AI v2.4 — Spatial Intelligence Engine
executiveSummary: Over the 40-month monitoring period, five encroachment zones have been identified on designated railway land within the NDLS Central District. Total encroached area: 30,500 sq.m across 2 confirmed and 3 suspected zones. Estimated annual revenue impact: ₹4.2 Cr. Railway Act 1989 compliance stands at 72% against a target of 95%. Immediate enforcement action is recommended for Zone S-7 (22,000 sq.m — commercial encroachment) and Parcel A-17 (8,500 sq.m — unauthorized construction).

zones.recommendation: Initiate enforcement proceedings under Railway Act Section 147
Field verification and boundary demarcation within 7 days
